mapper.sql: id, consumer_id, title, content, cover_url, images, topic, ref_song_id, ref_song_name, status, like_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.consumer_id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url, p.images, p.topic, p.ref_song_id, p.ref_song_name, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, c.username AS author_name, c.avator AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN consumer c ON p.consumer_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post p INNER JOIN follow f ON p.consumer_id = f.follow_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1
AND p.topic = #{topic}

SELECT p.id, p.consumer_id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url, p.images, p.topic, p.ref_song_id, p.ref_song_name, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, c.username AS author_name, c.avator AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN consumer c ON p.consumer_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.consumer_id = #{consumerId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND consumer_id = #{consumerId}

SELECT p.id, p.consumer_id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_url, p.images, p.topic, p.ref_song_id, p.ref_song_name, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, p.update_time, c.username AS author_name, c.avator AS author_avatar FROM post_like pl INNER JOIN post p ON pl.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN consumer c ON p.consumer_id = c.id WHERE pl.consumer_id = #{consumerId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY pl.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like pl INNER JOIN post p ON pl.post_id = p.id WHERE pl.consumer_id = #{consumerId} AND p.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
